title: cathar #5641
definition:
1) to hide, conceal
    1a) (Niphal)
        1a1) to hide oneself
        1a2) to be hidden, be concealed
    1b) (Piel) to hide carefully
    1c) (Pual) to be hidden carefully, be concealed
    1d) (Hiphil) to conceal, hide
    1e) (Hithpael) to hide oneself carefully
